news.title: Anthropic launches India pricing for Claude AI Pro and Max plans
news.description: Anthropic introduces India pricing for Claude AI Pro and Max plans with GST-inclusive billing, underscoring its focus on one of its fastest-growing global markets.

news.title: Nvidia halves Asia AI chip customer list, FT reports
news.description: Nvidia reduces its Asian AI chip customers by over half due to stricter compliance checks, targeting China-related sales.
